title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explores how complex logarithms can be used to transform Escher's Print Gallery, using conformal maps from complex analysis. The video demonstrates how the complex exponential and logarithm functions reveal hidden structure in this famous artwork and connects it to deeper mathematical principles.
